last_assistant_message:
## Report

**Status:** Done. FEAT-256 implemented, tested, committed.

**Files changed (2):**
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/src/AstraMemory.Infrastructure/Services/EmbeddingSimilarityProvider.cs` — added `IEmbeddingProvider` + `IVectorStore` ctor deps, implemented `NeighborsForTextAsync` with tenant-scoped pgvector cosine search.
- `C:/work/mega/memory/.claude/worktrees/feat-followups/tests/AstraMemory.Tests/TranscriptIngest/EmbeddingSimilarityProviderTests.cs` — new, 4 unit tests.

**Build:** clean (0 errors, only pre-existing repo-wide warnings: NU1507 package source mapping, one CS8600 in DecisionReviewJob.cs, one CS0618 in AdminAuthHelper.cs, one CS9113 in DecisionsController.cs — all unrelated to this change).

**Tests:** Passed! Failed: 0, Passed: 26, Skipped: 0 — covers EmbeddingSimilarityProviderTests (4 new) + MemoryGraphLinkerTests (6) + TranscriptIngestServiceTests + TranscriptIngestControllerTests.

**Commit SHA:** `01bd24fec578e4ef4a74ebba116eabd52e02cdef` on branch `chore/transcript-ingest-followups`. Stat: 2 files changed, 140 insertions(+), 9 deletions(-).

**Self-review:**
- 3-dep ctor — `graph`, `embedder`, `vectorStore`. Old `NeighborsAsync` semantics unchanged (still delegates to `graph.FindSimilarNeighborsAsync`).
- Blank-text + `topN <= 0` short-circuit returns `[]` without embedding or store call (verified by test #1).
- Empty embedding (`float[].Length == 0`) defensively returns `[]`.
- Tenant + status `"active"` filter always applied; project clause added only when `projectId` is non-empty.
- Two clauses -> `VectorFilter.And`; one clause -> raw `Eq` (covers edge case where someone called with no tenant — though tenant is always present here so the `count == 1` branch is effectively unreachable, kept for safety).
- Note: typed `filter` as `VectorFilter` (not `var`) — `clauses[0]` is `VectorFilter.Eq` and `clauses` is `List<VectorFilter>`, so `var` would have inferred `VectorFilter` via the ternary anyway, but explicit is clearer.
- Threshold filter applied post-search (store doesn't filter by score per design doc).
- Non-Guid match ids silently skipped.
- All 4 new tests pass; existing 6 linker tests + transcript-ingest tests still pass (mock-based, untouched by this change).
- `EmbeddingSimilarityProvider` is `internal sealed` — tests reach it via `InternalsVisibleTo("AstraMemory.Tests")` in `src/AstraMemory.Infrastructure/Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs`.
- DI: `EmbeddingSimilarityProvider` is registered as `ISimilarityProvider` at `ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs:233`. `IEmbeddingProvider` and `IVectorStore` are both already registered (lines 146 + 496/520/536/554). No DI changes required.
- Commit touches exactly 2 files as required.

**Concerns:** None. `MemoryGraphLinker` already calls `NeighborsForTextAsync(tenantId, hint, projectId, 1, 0.78f, ct)` per the design doc — no linker change needed and none made. Existing graceful-degradation comment was replaced with the working implementation. Vector store metadata field names (`tenant_id`, `status`, `project_id`) match the allow-list convention used in `MemoryGraphService.FindSimilarNeighborsAsync` (lines 138-141).

background_tasks.description: Wait until PR mergeable state resolves
background_tasks.command: cd "C:/work/mega/memory" && until [ "$(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" != "UNKNOWN" ]; do sleep 15; done && echo "mergeable: $(gh pr view 288 --json mergeable -q .mergeable)" && gh pr checks 288 2>&1 | head -20
